name: workflow closed-loop step commit-to-git-workflow invokes the git-workflow recommendation skill
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m init) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step commit-to-git-workflow --root repo --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'git_workflow_invoked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
